title: T2 — Near-Miss Record
description: A signal that was evaluated but NOT traded. The most valuable training data — captures the decision boundary.

agent_id.description: Your agent ID or unique bot identifier

score.description: The signal score that was evaluated

threshold.description: The minimum score required for execution — the line this signal didn't cross

reason_not_traded.description: Why the signal was passed — e.g. score_4.8_below_threshold_5.5, regime_filter, max_positions

signals.description: Full signal context — include everything your bot computed for this setup

reasons.description: What signals were present — even weak ones
